channel.title: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast
channel.description: A conversational podcast covering current events, trending topics, opinions, and reviews.
channel.itunes:author: Big D and G Funkadelic Radio Network

item.title: S1E1: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — Series Introduction
item.description: An energetic introduction to The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — a show blending current events, political satire, trending topics, technology, media narratives, and unfiltered opinion. This kickoff episode explains the show's premise, tone, recurring segments, and what listeners can expect each week.
item.content:encoded:
S1E1: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — Series Introduction

An energetic introduction to The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — a show blending current events, political satire, trending topics, technology, media narratives, and unfiltered opinion. This kickoff episode explains the show's premise, tone, recurring segments, and what listeners can expect each week.
item.itunes:title: S1E1: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — Series Introduction
item.itunes:subtitle: Where headlines breathe and the conversation is always on tap.
item.itunes:summary: An energetic introduction to The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast — a show blending current events, political satire, trending topics, technology, media narratives, and unfiltered opinion. This kickoff episode explains the show's premise, tone, recurring segments, and what listeners can expect each week.
item.itunes:author: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast

item.title: S1E2: Iran Conflict, Kristi Noem and DHS, Odds and Ends (Brittany Spears DUI, ChiBears, Lou Holtz)
item.description: In this debut episode, we dive into the rapidly escalating Iran conflict and what it could mean for the United States, global energy markets, and the broader Middle East as tensions rise and military operations intensify. We also unpack the political shake-up at the Department of Homeland Security following the removal of Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary and her reassignment to a new security role tied to the administration’s “Shield of the Americas” initiative, along with the internal drama and policy implications surrounding the move. Then we shift gears with some lighter—but still headline-worthy—odds and ends, including the latest buzz around a Britney Spears DUI incident, a quick look at what’s going on with the Chicago Bears, and a nostalgic discussion about legendary football coach Lou Holtz and his long-running influence on the game.
item.content:encoded:
S1E2: Iran Conflict, Kristi Noem and DHS, Odds and Ends (Brittany Spears DUI, ChiBears, Lou Holtz)

In this debut episode, we dive into the rapidly escalating Iran conflict and what it could mean for the United States, global energy markets, and the broader Middle East as tensions rise and military operations intensify. We also unpack the political shake-up at the Department of Homeland Security following the removal of Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary and her reassignment to a new security role tied to the administration’s “Shield of the Americas” initiative, along with the internal drama and policy implications surrounding the move. Then we shift gears with some lighter—but still headline-worthy—odds and ends, including the latest buzz around a Britney Spears DUI incident, a quick look at what’s going on with the Chicago Bears, and a nostalgic discussion about legendary football coach Lou Holtz and his long-running influence on the game.
item.itunes:title: S1E2: Iran Conflict, Kristi Noem and DHS, Odds and Ends (Brittany Spears DUI, ChiBears, Lou Holtz)
item.itunes:subtitle: Where headlines breathe and the conversation is always on tap.
item.itunes:summary: In this debut episode, we dive into the rapidly escalating Iran conflict and what it could mean for the United States, global energy markets, and the broader Middle East as tensions rise and military operations intensify. We also unpack the political shake-up at the Department of Homeland Security following the removal of Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary and her reassignment to a new security role tied to the administration’s “Shield of the Americas” initiative, along with the internal drama and policy implications surrounding the move. Then we shift gears with some lighter—but still headline-worthy—odds and ends, including the latest buzz around a Britney Spears DUI incident, a quick look at what’s going on with the Chicago Bears, and a nostalgic discussion about legendary football coach Lou Holtz and his long-running influence on the game.
item.itunes:author: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast

item.title: S1E3: TSA Gets ICE Help; SCOTUS Mail-In Ballots; Odds and Ends (Deployment, Mullen and Delta)
item.description: We break down the move to bring in ICE support for TSA operations, the Supreme Court’s latest on mail-in ballots, and a grab bag of other headlines worth watching. We also hit a few odds and ends, including deployment chatter, Mullen, and Delta, with sharp commentary and straight talk on what it all means. Fast-moving, opinionated, and packed with real-world implications, this episode covers a lot of ground without wasting your time.
item.content:encoded:
S1E3: TSA Gets ICE Help; SCOTUS Mail-In Ballots; Odds and Ends (Deployment, Mullen and Delta)

We break down the move to bring in ICE support for TSA operations, the Supreme Court’s latest on mail-in ballots, and a grab bag of other headlines worth watching. We also hit a few odds and ends, including deployment chatter, Mullen, and Delta, with sharp commentary and straight talk on what it all means. Fast-moving, opinionated, and packed with real-world implications, this episode covers a lot of ground without wasting your time.
item.itunes:title: S1E3: TSA Gets ICE Help; SCOTUS Mail-In Ballots; Odds and Ends (Deployment, Mullen and Delta)
item.itunes:subtitle: Where headlines breathe and the conversation is always on tap.
item.itunes:summary: We break down the move to bring in ICE support for TSA operations, the Supreme Court’s latest on mail-in ballots, and a grab bag of other headlines worth watching. We also hit a few odds and ends, including deployment chatter, Mullen, and Delta, with sharp commentary and straight talk on what it all means. Fast-moving, opinionated, and packed with real-world implications, this episode covers a lot of ground without wasting your time.
item.itunes:author: The 50 Shades of Beer Podcast
